1.description: get Trondheim municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: inspect quick-clay risk class identifiers in skredrisikokvikkleireklasse

3.description: select quick-clay hazard areas filtered by the identified high-risk class from utlopomr

5.description: reduce high-risk kvikkleire areas to Trondheim extent by intersecting municipality (step1) and kvikkleire areas (step3)

6.description: get parcels (teig) in Trondheim with area > 5000 m2

7.description: find parcels that intersect reduced quick-clay high-risk areas (step5)

8.description: assign each parcel to a county by intersecting parcels (step7) with fylke (step4)

9.description: deduplicate parcels, keep parcela id, area, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, fylkesnavn

10.description: sort parcels by area descending and then limit to top 10 in a following limit step (limit will be executed after sorting)

replan_trigger.error: Step 4 is planned to query database 'fylker', but was attempted against 'kvikkleire'. Produce a new plan or keep this step on the planned database.
